case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. GRANT WILLIG

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $142.50 SERVED AUG-28-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIG, GRANT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-24-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SARAH HEYWORTH. DEFENDANT GRANT WILLIG IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED THE DEFENDANT IS MAKING PAYMENTS AND WOULD LIKE A CONTROL DATE TO ENSURE COMPLAINCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$142.50) SERVED AUG-28-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIG, GRANT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. BY VISITING JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AND DEFENDANT GRANT WILLIG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,250.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIG, GRANT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
